prompt: A full-body cinematic portrait of an anthropomorphic squirrel child standing centered on a city pedestrian street in autumn, facing the camera with a calm, charming presence and hands tucked into the coat pockets. The character has fluffy squirrel ears, soft tan and cream fur, visible whiskers, and 1 large bushy tail sweeping out to the left side of the frame. Dress the character in a red beret, a blue plaid button-up shirt, brown corduroy overalls, a beige trench coat, and brown leather lace-up boots. Use a warm golden-hour palette with amber sunlight, shallow depth of field, and creamy bokeh. The background is a softly blurred urban shopping street with indistinct pedestrians, storefronts, and hints of red awnings, with fallen leaves scattered on the pavement. Photorealistic fur and fabric detail, storybook charm, fashion editorial styling, centered composition, eye-level camera, vertical portrait framing.
